_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
condition: Cerebral sino-venous thrombosis/ Stroke/ Acute ischemic stroke
source_files: Stroke_Cerebral sino-venous thrombosis_ Acute ischemic stroke_Medco.pdf
Stroke_Cerebral sino-venous thrombosis_ Acute ischemic stroke_PPD.CPD.pdf
clinical_indications: Focal collection of blood within the brain parenchyma or ventricular system that is not caused by trauma (Intracerebral haemorrhage)
Bleeding into the subarachnoid space (Subarachnoid haemorrhage)

preauth.label: Clinical notes with vitals (Blood pressure, Pulse rate)

ppd_preauth.q: Are clinical notes with detailed vital parameters record available?

cpd_claim.q: Did CT brain / MRI show any abnormality?
Was patient treated with thrombolytics, anticonvulsants, IV fluids?

common_queries: CT brain / MRI scan report does not show any abnormality, contradicting the diagnosis for Acute hemorrhagic stroke
Clinical notes with detailed vital parameters (BP, Pulse rate) missing or incomplete at pre-authorization for Acute hemorrhagic stroke
Indoor case papers missing or incomplete at claim submission for Acute hemorrhagic stroke
CT/MRI scan report missing or incomplete at claim submission for Acute hemorrhagic stroke
Discharge summary missing or incomplete at claim submission for Acute hemorrhagic stroke
Documentation regarding treatment with thrombolytics, anticonvulsants, or IV fluids is missing or unclear for Acute hemorrhagic stroke

additional_information.min_doctor_qualification_desirable: MD / DNB/ or equivalent (Medicine)/ MD / DNB/ PG Diploma/ or equivalent (Paediatrics)/ DM/DNB/ PG Diploma/ or equivalent (Neurology)
clinical_key_pointers: Numbness and weakness specially on one side of the body
Decreased vision in one or more eye
Difficulty in walking, loss of balance or coordination
Acute severe headache with no known cause
